strategy: Myth challenge boss (7990) with a pack of gimmick minions. Hit with Storm (+30%); never Myth (80% resist).

Round 1 he tags a wizard with a 5-round Myth DoT that detonates ~2500 and drops +10% lock traps on the team. Do not Triage it (that triggers a 2000 Insane Bolt). Manage it with Cooldown timed between the 4th and 5th tick, or Shift.
Do not clear the locks with an AoE; removing the last lock by AoE brings an Insane Bolt on the caster. If any locks remain after 5 rounds he strips all wards and re-locks, so handle the DoT cleanly.
Watch your pip count: end a turn with 5+ pips and the O'Leary Thug Mana Burns you. Skip Auras (Supernova counter) and go light on blades (they get stolen, Dark-Pacted, or Enfeebled).
Because setup is so punished, keep it minimal: a couple of traps and one strong Storm hit, healing through the DoT windows.
cheatNotes: He and his minions cleanse negative charms off themselves, so Weakness or Plague on them will not stick.
Round 1 he plants a 5-round Myth DoT (~2500 on detonation) and +10% lock traps on the team. Do not panic-remove it; manage the timing.
Using Triage or Mass Triage on that DoT triggers a 2000 Shadow Insane Bolt on the target. Never Triage it.
Shift and Cooldown are the safe ways to remove the DoT; Cooldown must land between the 4th and 5th tick. Time it rather than Triaging.
Remove all the locks and he Mass Triages himself and re-throws the DoT. Clearing locks just restarts the cycle.
If an AoE removes the last lock, he Insane Bolts the AoE caster. Do not AoE the locks off.
Leave any lock up past 5 rounds and he strips all wards from both sides and re-locks. Deal with the DoT within the window.
Cast an Aura and the O'Leary Thug Supernovas you. Skip auras.
End a turn holding 5 or more pips and he Mana Burns you. Spend down before passing your turn.
When one of his side lands an attack, the Midnighter Empowers it. Expect their damage to climb.
If one of his spells fizzles he Black Cats a wizard. Minor, but keep healed.
Dr. Von hits a random wizard every 3rd round with his Monster. Heal into rounds 3, 6, and 9.
Monster Mash lands on a random wizard every 4th round. Expect it.
Casting a blade gets its recipient Enfeebled. Blade the same round you hit.
Negative charms on the enemy get Cleansed off. Do not rely on Weakness or Plague.
Gibson steals and destroys a blade you cast. Aegis the important one or blade-and-hit the same round.
Universal, Elemental, or Fire blades get stolen. Prefer single-school blades you can hit with immediately.
Place a universal Trap on an enemy and he Backdrafts the caster. Use school-specific traps.
A single Trap or DoT on a wizard gets Detonated. Be careful stacking effects on your own team.
Universal Shields get stolen by Jacques. Use school shields or heal instead.
School-specific Shields also get stolen and destroyed. Defense is hard here; race him instead.
Heal-over-times get Snow Drifted off (pet heals too). Use direct heals.
